summary: Project involves a children's story about a hedgehog named Shurshik who helps find a lost lantern. The narrative features four main characters: Shurshik (a small, serious hedgehog who maintains forest order), a firefly (small but proud, helps illuminate the path), a rabbit (small, afraid of darkness), and an owl (wise advisor). The plot centers on Shurshik hearing crying in the forest, discovering a lost lantern, and embarking on a journey with the firefly to return the lantern to the trail. Note: There is a context mismatch—the latest exchange references Azure cloud governance, which appears unrelated to this children's story project.
key_facts: Main character: Shurshik, a small serious hedgehog who maintains forest order
Supporting characters: firefly (proud), rabbit (fear of darkness), owl (wise)
Central plot: Finding and returning lost lantern to trail
Story trigger: Shurshik hears crying and discovers lantern
Journey involves: Shurshik and firefly working together
